Video.summary: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.
Video.title: A Wolf's Journey

Video.summary: Can animals develop their own health care strategies? Learn more in this humorous investigation.
Video.title: Animal Doctors

Video.summary: Explore Antarctica, one of the world's most beautiful, yet inhospitable, landscapes.
Video.title: Antarctica

Video.summary: The love story between chickens and men has lasted for over 5000 years.
Video.title: Chicken Planet

Video.summary: The orchard is a unique ecosystem. As seasons change, we experience the interplay of nature, man, and animal.
Video.title: Carousel of Life

Video.summary: Take an exciting journey of discovery into an almost untouched wilderness: The Jura Mountains.
Video.title: The Jura Mountains

Video.summary: This episode focuses on Ticino, reaching from the Tessin Alps down to the charming Muggio Valley.
Video.title: Ticino

Video.summary: Take an amazing journey from the highest peaks of the Bernese Alps to a spectacular finish at the Rhine Falls.
Video.title: Water and Ice

Video.summary: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sense of Timing

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Underwater

Video.summary: While all life began in the oceans, human beings now rely on technology to navigate the seven seas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Super Senses: Wild Feats of Evolution
Video.title: Sky

Video.summary: Learn how the crocodile, shark, and whale evolved over millions of years to become modern masters of survival.
Video.title: Survival of the Fittest

Video.summary: No one runs the Race of Life faster than the big cats, winners in the contest for survival in the wild.
Video.title: The Big Cats

Video.summary: Learn the ways animals have adapted to survive (and thrive!) in the harsh climates of the world's deserts.
Video.title: The Great Desert Race

Video.summary: Somehow, some of the world's largest creatures prosper on the African Savannah with a strict vegetarian diet.
Video.title: Herbivores

Video.summary: Explore how animals win the Race of Life from the point of view of food, territory, social status, and mates.
Video.title: Natural Warriors

Video.summary: Nothing beats speed when it comes to survival in the wild. Learn how some animals are literally born to run.
Video.title: Run Like the Wind

Video.summary: The ibex, marmot, and European adder have all developed strategies to survive the harsh alpine winter.
Video.title: Winter in the Swiss Alps

Video.summary: Fiordland is the biggest national park in New Zealand, one of the largest conservation estates in the world.
Video.title: Fiordland

Video.summary: The Abel Tasman National Park is known for its golden beaches, but its interior has a dark and dramatic side.
Video.title: Abel Tasman

Video.summary: The Hauraki Gulf Marine Park was preserved by its own Act of Parliament more than a decade ago.
Video.title: Hauraki Marine Park

Video.summary: Gus visits a rugged, remote South Island landscape wedged between the Tasman Sea and the great Southern Alps.
Video.title: Westland Tai Poutini

Video.summary: Gus explores Aoraki Mt. Cook National Park, where 140 peaks above 2,000 meters tower over the landscape.
Video.title: Aoraki / Mt. Cook

Video.summary: Gus starts his exploration of Tongariro National Park by delving into the myths and lore of the park.
Video.title: Tongariro & Whanganui

Video.summary: Falcons attack, vultures swarm, and eagles swoop. Which of these is the true master of the sky?
Video.title: Masters of the Sky

Video.summary: In the lush tropical forests of Asia are some of nature's mightiest creatures.
Video.title: Biggest

Video.summary: Big cats, horned lizards, birds, cuttlefish, and chameleons all vie for the position of master of disguise.
Video.title: Camouflage

Video.summary: The Jura region in the Swiss Romandy has a surprisingly diverse natural landscape.
Video.title: Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains

Image.alt: Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains
Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains
Through the Seasons in the Jura Mountains

Video.summary: Great crested grebes and lizards are evidence of just how wild nature can be at Lake Maggiore.
Video.title: Lake Maggiore

Video.summary: Ticino, an area of Northern Italy, has an immensely varied natural landscape.
Video.title: Wild Ticino

Video.summary: Ibex, marmots, and common vipers all have different strategies for surviving winter's icy grip.
Video.title: Graubuenden in Winter

Video.summary: Explore the Aare, the longest river whose entire course lies within Switzerland.
Video.title: Along the Aare River
